title: Rujira Audit Contest

audit.reason: The audit report provides a clear and detailed analysis of potential vulnerabilities in the Rujira smart contract codebase. The identified issues, such as reentrancy attacks and integer overflow/underflow, are well-described with code snippets and recommendations for fixing them. The report is structured and easy to follow.
audit.improvements: Consider including a section on testing methodologies and tools used to identify the vulnerabilities. Additionally, a summary of the overall security assessment and recommendations for continuous monitoring and updates to the smart contracts could enhance the report.
